title: Bioinformatics Analyst
description: Baxter International, a global healthcare company, seeks a Bioinformatics Analyst to support our research and development efforts. Working fully remote, you'll analyze genomic and proteomic data, develop analytical pipelines, and contribute to medical product innovation. Join a team advancing healthcare through biotechnology.
responsibilities: Analyze genomic, proteomic, and sequencing data using bioinformatics tools
Develop and maintain data analysis pipelines and workflows
Perform statistical analysis and interpret biological data
Collaborate with research scientists on data requirements and analysis
Maintain data quality and implement validation procedures
Document analyses and contribute to research publications

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Bioinformatics, Biology, Computer Science, or related field
skills: Bioinformatics tools and databases (BLAST, KEGG, Ensembl)
Knowledge of genomics and molecular biology

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
